firesight.config.generic.comment.firesig: Highlights nearby air blocks that could catch fire.
firesight.config.generic.comment.debugLo: Prints verbose information to the log; useful when diagnosing issues.
firesight.config.generic.comment.scanRan: How far (in blocks) to search from the player for fire or lava.
firesight.config.generic.comment.visualC: Color and alpha of the overlay boxes.
firesight.config.hotkeys.comment.renderi: Turns the visual overlay on or off without opening the menu.
